_shorthelp: Button Can be part of a group. jQuery Mobile

text.desc: Text of button. Same as value

_color.desc: Color of letters. Can be name, #RRGGBB or rgb(R,G,B).

_backgroundColor.desc: Color of background. Can be name, #RRGGBB, rgb(R,G,B) or transparent.

_theme.desc: Theme: a-z. a is normal, b is black and others custom.

_groupBegin.desc: Is this the start of a group?

_groupEnd.desc: Is this the end of the group?

_image.desc: Image to display on button. Do not add files to /nsb.

_ChangeForm.desc: id of the form to change to when clicked.

_padding.desc: Number of pixels to the left and right of the text. Default is blank.

_htmltemplate: "{groupBegin!j}<button id='{id}' class='ui-btn {mini} {corners} ui-btn-inline{if theme<>''} ui-btn-{theme}{/if} ui-icon-{icon} ui-btn-icon-{iconPos} {if icon=='custom'} ui-nodisc-icon{/if}{disabled} {class}' style='{if _parent.position == 'absolute'}margin:0px; {/if}text-shadow:none;{if padding<>''} padding-left:{padding}px; padding-right:{padding}px;{/if} overflow:visible;{if fontSize<>''} font-size:{fontSize!p};{/if}{if fontFamily<>''} font-family:{fontFamily};{/if}{if fontStyle<>''} font-style:{fontStyle};{/if}{if fontWeight<>''} font-weight:{fontWeight};{/if}{if color<>''} color:{color};{/if}{if backgroundColor<>''} background-color:{backgroundColor};{/if}{if borderWidth.isdigit()} border-width:{borderWidth!p}; border-style:{borderStyle}; border-color:{borderColor};{/if} {hidden}{style!j}' data-nsb-type=Button_jqm>{if image<>''}<image src='{image}'>{/if}{value!j}</button>{groupEnd!j}",
